python3 - << 'PY'
import json
p='/home/hsenidmobile.net/dewmike.a/Documents/Projects/Deepx/_outputs/weather_task_output/weather_colombo_raw.json.failed'
with open(p,'r',encoding='utf-8') as f:
    s=f.read()
# replace escaped quote sequences and escaped underscores
s=s.replace('\\"','"')
s=s.replace('\\_','_')
s=s.replace('\\/','/')
# also replace any escaped single backslashes before letters? not needed
try:
    obj=json.loads(s)
    out='/home/hsenidmobile.net/dewmike.a/Documents/Projects/Deepx/_outputs/weather_task_output/weather_colombo_raw.json'
    with open(out,'w',encoding='utf-8') as f:
        json.dump(obj,f,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2)
    print('ok')
except Exception as e:
    print('fail',e)
    with open(p+'.2','w',encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write(s)
PY
